summary_bullets: The name of this setup is double eight.

It's very easy and you just need to follow my instruction.

And now we need to change their settings.
So here we go to the settings of the ribbon.
And first here for the moving average type, we set exponential moving average for them because as I said, we need four exponential moving averages.
So here we set EMA for them.

extracted_rules: When you add this indicator, automatically four moving averages are added to the chart.
If you remember, these two white lines here are EMA with length of eight.
From here, when this candle is closed, you can see that both of the white lines are above the green channel.
When we got this, we go back on the price action and we find the highest high and we mark this level.
If it is far from the green channel, it is not a good pullback and you shouldn't take any action.
So we already marked this high and we should wait and see if the price is able to close above this level or not because this high can act as a potential resistance level.
So here the reversal of the price is confirmed and in practice we could enter a long position at this point with the stop loss below the pullback and profit target at risk-to-reward ratio of two.
In a short position setup which is when we are trying to catch starting of a downtrend in the first step we want crossing of the price below the green channel.

When this happened and we got a candle that has closed above the white channel, we go back on the price action and we find the lowest low and we mark this level and we should wait and see if the price can break this level or not.

So the buy signal is confirmed and in practice we could enter a long position at this point with the stop loss below the pullback and profit target at risk-to-reward ratio of two and you can see that this trade is also a profitable trade where the price advanced up to this point making this position profitable.
Before this we mark the lowest low and we wait to see if the price can break this level.

To lower our risk, we follow the rules of our trading strategy.

strategy_components.description: This green channel is going to help us with trend changes and the white channel is going to help us with momentum changes inside trends.
This is a reversal trading strategy and we're going to find the points of the market that the trend is changing and then we're going to find an excellent opportunity to enter a trade.
This is an early signal that probably an uptrend is forming in the market.
So here the reversal of the price is confirmed and in practice Entry: a long position at this point with the Stop: below the pullback and Target: 2R.
In a short position setup which is when we are trying to catch starting of a downtrend in the first step we want crossing of the price below the green channel.
This is an early signal that probably a downtrend is forming in the market.

So the buy signal is confirmed and in practice Entry: a long position at this point with the Stop: below the pullback and Target: 2R and you can see that this trade is also a profitable trade where the price advanced up
And you can see that again the price turned to an uptrend.
To lower our risk, we follow the rules of our trading strategy.
So we have early conditions of an uptrend.
So by considering this point that the pullback should go near to the green channel or ideally inside the green channel you can avoid false signals like this.
So the reversal is confirmed and in practice Entry: a short position at this point with the stop loss above the pullback and Target: 2R and you can see that this trade was also a profitable trade.

This trading strategy is very accurate because it has different layers of confirmation with the final confirmation based on price action breaking which helps to filter most of the false signals but not all of them.
